    Module mathcomp.analysis.normedtype_theory.tvs

    From HB Require Import structures.
    From mathcomp Require Import all_ssreflect_compat ssralg ssrnum vector.
    From mathcomp Require Import interval_inference.
    #[warning="-warn-library-file-internal-analysis"]
    From mathcomp Require Import unstable.
    From mathcomp Require Import boolp classical_sets functions cardinality.
    From mathcomp Require Import convex set_interval reals topology num_normedtype.
    From mathcomp Require Import pseudometric_normed_Zmodule.

    # Topological vector spaces This file introduces locally convex topological vector spaces. ``` NbhsNmodule == HB class, join of Nbhs and Nmodule NbhsZmodule == HB class, join of Nbhs and Zmodule NbhsLmodule K == HB class, join of Nbhs and Lmodule over K K is a numDomainType. PreTopologicalNmodule == HB class, join of Topological and Nmodule TopologicalNmodule == HB class, PreTopologicalNmodule with a continuous addition PreTopologicalZmodule == HB class, join of Topological and Zmodule topologicalZmodType == topological abelian group TopologicalZmodule == HB class, join of TopologicalNmodule and Zmodule with a continuous opposite operator preTopologicalLmodType K == topological space and Lmodule over K K is a numDomainType The HB class is PreTopologicalLmodule. topologicalLmodType K == topologicalNmodule and Lmodule over K with a continuous scaling operation The HB class is TopologicalLmodule. PreUniformNmodule == HB class, join of Uniform and Nmodule UniformNmodule == HB class, join of Uniform and Nmodule with a uniformly continuous addition PreUniformZmodule == HB class, join of Uniform and Zmodule UniformZmodule == HB class, join of UniformNmodule and Zmodule with uniformly continuous opposite operator PreUniformLmodule K == HB class, join of Uniform and Lmodule over K K is a numDomainType. UniformLmodule K == HB class, join of UniformNmodule and Lmodule with a uniformly continuous scaling operation K is a numFieldType. convexTvsType R == interface type for a locally convex tvs on a numDomain R A convex tvs is constructed over a uniform space. The HB class is ConvexTvs. subConvexTvsType R V S == join of subTopologicalType, convexTvsType, and subLmoduleType The HB class is SubConvexTvs. Instance: in particular, it is shown that a sub-Lmodule is a sub-convex TVS. PreTopologicalLmod_isConvexTvs == factory allowing the construction of a convex tvs from an Lmodule which is also a topological space {linear_continuous E -> F} == the type of all linear and continuous functions between E and F, where E is a NbhsLmodule.type and F a NbhsZmodule.type over a numDomainType R The HB class is called LinearContinuous. The notation {linear_continuous E -> F | s} also exists. lcfun E F s == membership predicate for linear continuous functions of type E -> F with scalar operator s : K -> F -> F E and F have type convexTvsType K. This is used in particular to attach a type of lmodType to {linear_continuous E -> F | s}. lcfun_spec f == specification for membership of the linear continuous function f ``` HB instances: - The type R^o (R : numFieldType) is endowed with the structure of ConvexTvs. - The product of two Tvs is endowed with the structure of ConvexTvs. - {linear_continuous E-> F} is endowed with a lmodType structure when E and F are convexTvs.

    Reserved Notation "'{' 'linear_continuous' U '->' V '|' s '}'"
      (at level 0, U at level 98, V at level 99,
       format "{ 'linear_continuous' U -> V | s }").
    Reserved Notation "'{' 'linear_continuous' U '->' V '}'"
      (at level 0, U at level 98, V at level 99,
        format "{ 'linear_continuous' U -> V }").

    Unset SsrOldRewriteGoalsOrder.
    Set Implicit Arguments.
    Unset Strict Implicit.
    Unset Printing Implicit Defensive.

    Import Order.TTheory GRing.Theory Num.Def Num.Theory.
    Import numFieldTopology.Exports.

    Local Open Scope classical_set_scope.
    Local Open Scope ring_scope.

    Section TopologicalNmodule_theory.
    Variable (
    E
    Source code

    TODO: We have observed one thing: `pseudometric_normedZmodType` is morally a `topologicalNmodule` but `topologicalNmodule` is defined later in `tvs.v` (which imports `pseudometric_normed_zmodule.v`). We think that it should be defined at the beginning of `pseudometric_normed_zmodule.v` and that `pseudometric_normedZmodType` should be defined using `topologicalNmodule`. We have realized this because of the lemmas such as `cvgD/fun_cvgD` that we needed to duplicate.
    Lemma
    fun_cvgD
    Source code
     {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter U} (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : E -> F)
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     :
      f @ U --> a -> g @ U --> b -> (f \+ g) @ U --> a + b.
    Proof.
    move=> fa ga.
    by apply: continuous2_cvg; [exact: (add_continuous (a, b))|by []..].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_sum
    Source code
     (
    I
    Source code
     : Type) (
    r
    Source code
     : seq I) (
    P
    Source code
     : pred I)
        (
    Ff
    Source code
     : I -> E -> F) (
    Fa
    Source code
     : I -> F) :
      Filter U -> (forall
    i
    Source code
    , P i -> Ff i x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> U] --> Fa i) ->
      \sum_(
    i
    Source code
     <- r | P i) Ff i x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> U] --> \sum_(
    i
    Source code
     <- r| P i) Fa i.
    Proof.
    by move=> FF Ffa; apply: cvg_big => //; apply: add_continuous. Qed.

    Lemma
    sum_continuous
    Source code
     (
    I
    Source code
     : Type) (
    r
    Source code
     : seq I) (

    Source code

      continuous (fun
    x1
    Source code
     : E => \sum_(
    i
    Source code
     <- r | P i) f i x1).
    Proof.
    by move=> FC0; apply: continuous_big => //; apply: add_continuous. Qed.

    End TopologicalNmodule_theory.

    Lemma
    sub_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : M * M => x.1 - x.2).
    Proof.
    move=> x; apply: (@continuous_comp _ _ _ (fun
    x
    Source code
     => (x.1, - x.2))
      (fun
    x
    Source code
     : M * M => x.1 + x.2)); last exact: add_continuous.
    apply: cvg_pair; first exact: cvg_fst.
    by apply: continuous_comp; [exact: cvg_snd|exact: opp_continuous].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fun_cvgN
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : topologicalZmodType) (
    U
    Source code
     : set_system M) {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter U}
        (
    f
    Source code
     : M -> F)
    a
    Source code
     :
      f @ U --> a -> \- f @ U --> - a.
    Proof.
    by move=> ?; apply: continuous_cvg => //; exact: opp_continuous. Qed.

    End TopologicalZmoduleTheory.

    Let
    opp_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (-%R : M -> M).
    Proof.
    move=> x; rewrite /continuous_at.
    rewrite -(@eq_cvg _ _ _ (fun
    x
    Source code
     => 0 - x)); first by move=> y; exact: add0r.
    rewrite -[- x]add0r.
    apply: (@continuous_comp _ _ _ (fun
    x
    Source code
     => (0, x)) (fun
    x
    Source code
     : M * M => x.1 - x.2)).
      by apply: cvg_pair => /=; [exact: cvg_cst|exact: cvg_id].
    exact: sub_continuous.
    Qed.

    Let
    add_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : M * M => x.1 + x.2).
    Proof.
    move=> x; rewrite /continuous_at.
    rewrite -(@eq_cvg _ _ _ (fun
    x
    Source code
     => x.1 - (- x.2))).
      by move=> y; rewrite opprK.
    rewrite -[in x.1 + _](opprK x.2).
    apply: (@continuous_comp _ _ _ (fun
    x
    Source code
     => (x.1, - x.2)) (fun
    x
    Source code
     => x.1 - x.2)).
      apply: cvg_pair; first exact: cvg_fst.
      by apply: continuous_comp; [exact: cvg_snd|exact: opp_continuous].
    exact: sub_continuous.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fun_cvgZ
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
     : set_system E) {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter U} (
    l
    Source code
     : E -> R) (
    f
    Source code
     : E -> F)
        (
    r
    Source code
     : R)
    a
    Source code
     :
      l @ U --> r -> f @ U --> a ->
      l x *: f x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> U] --> r *: a.
    Proof.
    by move=> *; apply: continuous2_cvg => //; exact: (scale_continuous (_, _)).
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fun_cvgZr
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
     : set_system E) {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter U}
    k
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : E -> F)
    a
    Source code
     :
      f @ U --> a -> k \*: f @ U --> k *: a.
    Proof.
    by apply: fun_cvgZ => //; exact: cvg_cst. Qed.

    End TopologicalLmodule_theory.

    Let
    opp_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (-%R : M -> M).
    Proof.
    move=> x; rewrite /continuous_at.
    rewrite -(@eq_cvg _ _ _ (fun
    x
    Source code
     => -1 *: x)); first by move=> y; rewrite scaleN1r.
    rewrite -[- x]scaleN1r.
    apply: (@continuous_comp M (R^o * M)%type M (fun
    x
    Source code
     => (-1, x))
      (fun
    x
    Source code
     => x.1 *: x.2)); last exact: scale_continuous.
    by apply: (@cvg_pair _ _ _ _ (nbhs (-1 : R^o))); [exact: cvg_cst|exact: cvg_id].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    opp_unif_continuous
    Source code
     : unif_continuous (-%R : M -> M).
    Proof.
    have unif : unif_continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     => (0, x) : M * M).
      move=> /= U [[]] /= U1 U2 [] U1e U2e /subsetP U12.
      apply: filterS U2e => x xU2/=.
      have /U12 : ((0, 0), x) \in U1 `*` U2.
        by rewrite in_setX/= (mem_set xU2) andbT inE; exact: entourage_refl.
      by rewrite inE/= => -[[[a1 a2] [b1 b2]]]/= /[swap]-[] -> -> <-.
    move=> /= U /sub_unif_continuous /unif /=.
    rewrite -comp_preimage/= /comp/= /nbhs/=.
    by congr entourage => /=; rewrite eqEsubset; split=> x /=; rewrite !sub0r.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    add_unif_continuous
    Source code
     : unif_continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : M * M => x.1 + x.2).
    Proof.
    have unif: unif_continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     => (x.1, -x.2) : M * M).
      move=> /= U [[]]/= U1 U2 [] U1e /opp_unif_continuous.
      rewrite /nbhs/= => U2e /subsetP U12.
      apply: (@filterS _ _ entourage_filter
          ((fun
    xy
    Source code
     => (xy.1.1, xy.2.1, (-xy.1.2, -xy.2.2))) @^-1` (U1 `*` U2))).
        move=> /= [] [] a1 a2 [] b1 b2/= [] ab1 ab2.
        have /U12 : (a1, b1, (-a2, -b2)) \in U1 `*` U2 by rewrite !inE.
        by rewrite inE/= => [] [] [] [] c1 c2 [] d1 d2/= cd [] <- <- <- <-.
      exists (U1, ((fun
    xy
    Source code
     : M * M => (- xy.1, - xy.2)) @^-1` U2)); first by split.
      by move=> /= [] [] a1 a2 [] b1 b2/= [] aU bU; exists (a1, b1, (a2, b2)).
    move=> /= U /sub_unif_continuous/unif; rewrite /nbhs/=.
    rewrite -comp_preimage/=/comp/=.
    by congr entourage; rewrite eqEsubset; split=> x /=; rewrite !opprK.
    Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      PreUniformNmodule_isUniformNmodule.Build M add_unif_continuous.

    .

    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      UniformNmodule_isUniformZmodule.Build M opp_unif_continuous.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    end
    Source code
    .

    Section UniformZmoduleTheory.
    Variables (
    M
    Source code
     : UniformZmodule.type).

    Lemma
    sub_unif_continuous
    Source code
     : unif_continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : M * M => x.1 - x.2).
    Proof.
    suff unif: unif_continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     => (x.1, - x.2) : M * M).
      by move=> /= U /add_unif_continuous/unif; rewrite /nbhs/= -comp_preimage.
    move=> /= U [[]]/= U1 U2 [] U1e /opp_unif_continuous.
    rewrite /nbhs/= => U2e /subsetP U12.
    apply: (@filterS _ _ entourage_filter
        ((fun
    xy
    Source code
     => (xy.1.1, xy.2.1, (- xy.1.2, - xy.2.2))) @^-1` (U1 `*` U2))).
      move=> /= [] [] a1 a2 [] b1 b2/= [] ab1 ab2.
      have /U12 : (a1, b1, (-a2, -b2)) \in U1 `*` U2 by rewrite !inE.
      by rewrite inE/= => [] [] [] [] c1 c2 [] d1 d2/= cd [] <- <- <- <-.
    exists (U1, ((fun
    xy
    Source code
     : M * M => (- xy.1, - xy.2)) @^-1` U2)); first by split.
    by move=> /= [] [] a1 a2 [] b1 b2/= [] aU bU; exists (a1, b1, (a2, b2)).
    Qed.

    End UniformZmoduleTheory.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    structure
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    PreUniformLmodule
    Source code
     (
    K
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    numDomainType
    Source code
    ) :=
      {
    M
    Source code
     of Uniform M & GRing.Lmodule K M}.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    mixin
    Source code
    Record
    Source code
    PreUniformLmodule_isUniformLmodule
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    numFieldType
    Source code
    ) M
        & PreUniformLmodule R M := {
      scale_unif_continuous : unif_continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : R^o * M => z.1 *: z.2) ;
    }.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    structure
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    UniformLmodule
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    numFieldType
    Source code
    ) :=
      {
    M
    Source code
     of UniformZmodule M & GRing.Lmodule R M
            & PreUniformLmodule_isUniformLmodule R M}.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    factory
    Source code
    Record
    Source code
    UniformNmodule_isUniformLmodule
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    numFieldType
    Source code
    ) M
        & PreUniformLmodule R M := {
      scale_unif_continuous : unif_continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : R^o * M => z.1 *: z.2) ;
    }.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    builders
    Source code
    Context
    Source code
    R
    Source code
    M
    Source code
    &
    Source code
    UniformNmodule_isUniformLmodule
    Source code
     R M.

    Lemma
    opp_unif_continuous
    Source code
     : unif_continuous (-%R : M -> M).
    Proof.
    have unif: unif_continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     => (-1, x) : R^o * M).
      move=> /= U [[]] /= U1 U2 [] U1e U2e /subsetP U12.
      rewrite /nbhs/=.
      apply: filterS U2e => x xU2/=.
      have /U12 : ((-1, -1), x) \in U1 `*` U2.
        rewrite in_setX/= (mem_set xU2) andbT.
        by apply/mem_set; exact: entourage_refl.
      by rewrite inE/= => [[[]]] [] a1 a2 [] b1 b2/= abU [] {2}<- <- <-/=.
    move=> /= U /scale_unif_continuous/unif/=.
    rewrite /nbhs/=.
    rewrite -comp_preimage/=/comp/=.
    by congr entourage; rewrite eqEsubset; split=> x /=; rewrite !scaleN1r.
    Qed.

    #[warning=
    Source code

    :=

      UniformNmodule_isUniformZmodule.Build M opp_unif_continuous.

    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      PreUniformLmodule_isUniformLmodule.Build R M scale_unif_continuous.

    Source code
    .
    end
    Source code
    .

    HB
    Source code
    .
    mixin
    Source code
    Record
    Source code
    Uniform_isConvexTvs
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    numDomainType
    Source code
    ) E
        & Uniform E & GRing.Lmodule R E := {
      locally_convex : exists2
    B
    Source code
     : set_system E,
        (forall
    b
    Source code
    , b \in B -> convex_set b) & basis B
    }.

    #[short
    Source code
    (
    type=
    Source code
    "convexTvsType"
    Source code
    )
    ]
    Source code

    HB
    Source code
    .
    structure
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    ConvexTvs
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    numDomainType
    Source code
    ) :=
      {
    E
    Source code
     of Uniform_isConvexTvs R E & Uniform E & TopologicalLmodule R E}.

    #[short
    Source code
    (
    type=
    Source code
    "subConvexTvsType"

    ]

    HB
    Source code
    .
    structure
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    SubConvexTvs
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    numDomainType
    Source code
    ) (V : convexTvsType R)
        (S : pred V) :=
      {
    U
    Source code
     of SubTopological V S U & ConvexTvs R U & @GRing.SubLmodule R V S U }.

    Section SubLmodule_isSubConvexTvs.
    Context (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : convexTvsType R) (
    S
    Source code
     : pred V) (
    U
    Source code
     : subLmodType S).

    Local Notation
    sub_init_topo
    Source code
     := (sub_initial_topology U).
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    Uniform
    Source code
    .on sub_init_topo.
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    GRing
    Source code
    .Lmodule.on sub_init_topo.

    Let
    add_sub
    Source code
    : continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : sub_init_topo * sub_init_topo => x.1 + x.2).
    Proof.
    apply: continuous_comp_initial => -[/= x y].
    pose h := fun
    xy
    Source code
     : U * U => (\val xy.1, \val xy.2).
    pose g := fun
    xy
    Source code
     : V * V => xy.1 + xy.2.
    rewrite (_ : _ \o _ = g \o h).
      by apply/funext => i /=; rewrite GRing.valD.
    apply: continuous_comp; last exact: add_continuous.
    apply: cvg_pair => //=.
    - apply: (cvg_comp _ _ cvg_fst).
      exact: (continuous_valE (x : sub_init_topo)).
    - apply: (cvg_comp _ _ cvg_snd).
      exact: (continuous_valE (y : sub_init_topo)).
    Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      
    @PreTopologicalNmodule_isTopologicalNmodule
    Source code
    .Build sub_init_topo add_sub.

    Let
    opp_sub
    Source code
     : continuous (-%R : sub_init_topo -> sub_init_topo).
    Proof.
    apply: continuous_comp_initial => x.
    rewrite (_ : _ \o _ = -%R \o \val).
      by apply/funext=> i /=; rewrite GRing.valN.
    apply: continuous_comp; first exact: continuous_valE.
    exact: opp_continuous.
    Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      TopologicalNmodule_isTopologicalZmodule.Build sub_init_topo opp_sub.

    Let
    scale_sub
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : R^o * sub_init_topo => z.1 *: z.2).
    Proof.
    apply: continuous_comp_initial => - [] /= x /= y.
    pose h := fun
    xy
    Source code
     : R * U => (xy.1, \val xy.2).
    pose g := fun
    xy
    Source code
     : R * V => xy.1 *: xy.2.
    rewrite (_ : _ \o _ = g \o h); first by apply/funext=> i /=; rewrite GRing.valZ.
    apply: continuous_comp; last exact: scale_continuous.
    move=> /= A [/= [/= B C]] [[r/= r0 xrB]].
    move/(continuous_valE (y : sub_init_topo)) => [/= C' [woC' C'y C'C] BCA].
    apply: filterS; first exact: BCA.
    exists (ball x r, C') => /=.
      by split; [exact: nbhsx_ballx|exists C'; split].
    by move=> su/= [xru C'u]; split; [exact: xrB|exact: C'C].
    Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      TopologicalZmodule_isTopologicalLmodule.Build R sub_init_topo scale_sub.

    Local Open Scope convex_scope.

    Let
    locally_convex_sub
    Source code
     : exists2
    B
    Source code
     : set_system sub_init_topo,
      (forall
    b
    Source code
    , b \in B -> convex_set b) & basis B.
    Proof.
    have [B convexB [openB/= genB]] := @locally_convex R V.
    exists [set
    a
    Source code
     | exists2
    b
    Source code
    , B b & \val @^-1` b = a].
      move=> a /[!inE]/= -[b Bb ba] r s l ra sa.
      suff : \val (r <|l|> s) \in b by rewrite !inE /= -ba.
      rewrite !GRing.valD !GRing.valZ convexB//; first exact: mem_set.
      - by move: ra; rewrite -ba !inE.
      - by move: sa; rewrite -ba !inE.
    split => /=.
      move=> a/= [b Bb <-]; rewrite /open/= /initial_open/=; exists b => //.
      exact: openB.
    move=> x a [/= b [[/=c openc] cb bx ba]].
    rewrite /nbhs/= /filter_from/=.
    have : nbhs (val x) c.
     rewrite nbhsE /=; exists c => //; split => //.
     by move: bx; rewrite -cb.
    move/genB => [d [Bd dx dc]].
    exists (\val @^-1` d); first by split => //; exists d.
    by move=> y dy; apply: ba; rewrite -cb; exact: dc.
    Qed.

    Local Close Scope convex_scope.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      
    @Uniform_isConvexTvs
    Source code
    .Build R sub_init_topo locally_convex_sub.
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    GRing
    Source code
    .SubLmodule.on sub_init_topo.

    End SubLmodule_isSubConvexTvs.

    Section properties_of_topologicalLmodule.
    Context (
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType) (
    E
    Source code
     : preTopologicalLmodType R) (
    U
    Source code
     : set E).

    Lemma
    nbhsN_subproof
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : R^o * E => z.1 *: z.2)) (
    x
    Source code
     : E) :
      nbhs x U -> nbhs (-x) (-%R @` U).
    Proof.
    move=> Ux; move: (f (-1, -x) U); rewrite /= scaleN1r opprK => /(_ Ux) [] /=.
    move=> [B] B12 [B1 B2] BU; near=> y; exists (- y); rewrite ?opprK// -scaleN1r//.
    apply: (BU (-1, y)); split => /=; last by near: y.
    by move: B1 => [] ? ?; apply => /=; rewrite subrr normr0.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs0N_subproof
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : R^o * E => z.1 *: z.2)) :
      nbhs 0 U -> nbhs 0 (-%R @` U).
    Proof.
    by move => Ux; rewrite -oppr0; exact: nbhsN_subproof. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhsT_subproof
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : E * E => x.1 + x.2)) (
    x
    Source code
     : E) :
      nbhs 0 U -> nbhs x (+%R x @` U).
    Proof.
    move => U0; have /= := f (x, -x) U; rewrite subrr => /(_ U0).
    move=> [B] [B1 B2] BU; near=> x0.
    exists (x0 - x); last by rewrite addrC subrK.
    by apply: (BU (x0, -x)); split; [near: x0; rewrite nearE|exact: nbhs_singleton].
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhsB_subproof
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : E * E => x.1 + x.2)) (
    z
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : E) :
      nbhs z U -> nbhs (x + z) (+%R x @` U).
    Proof.
    move=> U0; have /= := f (x + z, -x) U; rewrite [x + z]addrC addrK.
    move=> /(_ U0)[B] [B1 B2] BU; near=> x0.
    exists (x0 - x); last by rewrite addrC subrK.
    by apply: (BU (x0, -x)); split; [near: x0; rewrite nearE|exact: nbhs_singleton].
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    End properties_of_topologicalLmodule.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    factory
    Source code
    Record
    Source code
    PreTopologicalLmod_isConvexTvs
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    numDomainType
    Source code
    ) E
        & Topological E & GRing.Lmodule R E := {
      add_continuous : continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : E * E => x.1 + x.2) ;
      scale_continuous : continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : R^o * E => z.1 *: z.2) ;
      locally_convex : exists2
    B
    Source code
     : set_system E,
        (forall
    b
    Source code
    , b \in B -> convex_set b) & basis B
      }.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    builders
    Source code
    Context
    Source code
    R
    Source code
    E
    Source code
    &
    Source code
    PreTopologicalLmod_isConvexTvs
    Source code
     R E.

    Definition
    entourage
    Source code
     : set_system (E * E) :=
      fun
    P
    Source code
     => exists (
    U
    Source code
     : set E), nbhs (0 : E) U /\
                         (forall
    xy
    Source code
     : E * E, (xy.1 - xy.2) \in U -> xy \in P).

    Let
    nbhs0N
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
     : set E) : nbhs (0 : E) U -> nbhs (0 : E) (-%R @` U).
    Proof.
    exact/nbhs0N_subproof/scale_continuous. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhsN
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
     : set E) (
    x
    Source code
     : E) : nbhs x U -> nbhs (-x) (-%R @` U).
    Proof.
    exact/nbhsN_subproof/scale_continuous. Qed.

    Let
    nbhsT
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
     : set E) (
    x
    Source code
     : E) : nbhs (0 : E) U -> nbhs x (+%R x @`U).
    Proof.
    exact/nbhsT_subproof/add_continuous. Qed.

    Let
    nbhsB
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
     : set E) (
    z
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : E) : nbhs z U -> nbhs (x + z) (+%R x @`U).
    Proof.
    exact/nbhsB_subproof/add_continuous. Qed.

    Lemma
    entourage_filter
    Source code
     : Filter entourage.
    Proof.
    split; first by exists [set: E]; split; first exact: filter_nbhsT.
      move=> P Q; rewrite /entourage nbhsE /=.
      move=> [U [[B B0] BU Bxy]] [V [[C C0] CV Cxy]].
      exists (U `&` V); split => [|xy].
        by exists (B `&` C); [exact: open_nbhsI|exact: setISS].
      by rewrite !in_setI => /andP[/Bxy-> /Cxy->].
    by move=> P Q PQ [U [HU Hxy]]; exists U; split=> [|xy /Hxy /[!inE] /PQ].
    Qed.

    Local Lemma
    entourage_refl
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set (E * E)) :
      entourage A -> [set
    xy
    Source code
     | xy.1 = xy.2] `<=` A.
    Proof.
    move=> [U [U0 Uxy]] xy eq_xy; apply/set_mem/Uxy; rewrite eq_xy subrr.
    apply/mem_set; exact: nbhs_singleton.
    Qed.

    Local Lemma
    entourage_inv
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set (E * E)) :
      entourage A -> entourage A^-1%relation.
    Proof.
    move=> [/= U [U0 Uxy]]; exists (-%R @` U); split; first exact: nbhs0N.
    move=> xy /set_mem /=; rewrite -opprB => [[yx] Uyx] /oppr_inj yxE.
    by apply/Uxy/mem_set; rewrite /= -yxE.
    Qed.

    Local Lemma
    entourage_split_ex
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set (E * E)) : entourage A ->
      exists2
    B
    Source code
     : set (E * E), entourage B & (B \; B)%relation `<=` A.
    Proof.
    move=> [/= U] [U0 Uxy]; rewrite /entourage /=.
    have := @add_continuous (0, 0); rewrite /continuous_at/= addr0 => /(_ U U0)[]/=.
    move=> [W1 W2] []; rewrite nbhsE/= => [[U1 nU1 UW1] [U2 nU2 UW2]] Wadd.
    exists [set
    w
    Source code
     | (W1 `&` W2) (w.1 - w.2)].
      exists (W1 `&` W2); split; last by [].
      exists (U1 `&` U2); first exact: open_nbhsI.
      by move=> t [U1t U2t]; split; [exact: UW1|exact: UW2].
    move => xy /= [z [H1 _] [_ H2]]; apply/set_mem/(Uxy xy)/mem_set.
    rewrite [_ - _](_ : _ = (xy.1 - z) + (z - xy.2)); first by rewrite addrA subrK.
    exact: (Wadd (xy.1 - z,z - xy.2)).
    Qed.

    Local Lemma
    nbhsE
    Source code
     : nbhs = nbhs_ entourage.
    Proof.
    have lem : -1 != 0 :> R by rewrite oppr_eq0 oner_eq0.
    rewrite /nbhs_ /=; apply/funext => x; rewrite /filter_from/=.
    apply/funext => U; apply/propext => /=; rewrite /entourage /=; split.
    - pose V : set E := [set
    v
    Source code
     | x - v \in U].
      move=> nU; exists [set
    xy
    Source code
     | xy.1 - xy.2 \in V]; last first.
        by move=> y /xsectionP; rewrite /V /= !inE /= opprB addrC subrK inE.
      exists V; split; last by move=> xy; rewrite !inE /= inE.
      have /= := nbhsB x (nbhsN nU); rewrite subrr /= /V.
      rewrite [X in nbhs _ X -> _](_ : _ = [set
    v
    Source code
     | x - v \in U])//.
      apply/funext => /= v /=; rewrite inE; apply/propext; split.
        by move=> [x0 [x1]] Ux1 <- <-; rewrite opprB addrC subrK.
      move=> Uxy; exists (v - x); last by rewrite addrC subrK.
      by exists (x - v); rewrite ?opprB.
    - move=> [A [U0 [nU UA]] H]; near=> z; apply: H; apply/xsectionP/set_mem/UA.
      near: z; rewrite nearE; have := nbhsT x (nbhs0N nU).
      rewrite [X in nbhs _ X -> _](_ : _ = [set
    v
    Source code
     | x - v \in U0])//.
      apply/funext => /= z /=; apply/propext; split.
        by move=> [x0] [x1 Ux1 <-] <-; rewrite opprB addrC subrK inE.
      rewrite inE => Uxz; exists (z - x); last by rewrite addrC subrK.
      by exists (x - z); rewrite ?opprB.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    Nbhs_isUniform_mixin
    Source code
    .Build E
        entourage_filter entourage_refl
        entourage_inv entourage_split_ex
        nbhsE.


    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    PreTopologicalNmodule_isTopologicalNmodule
    Source code
    .Build E add_continuous.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    TopologicalNmodule_isTopologicalLmodule
    Source code
    .Build R E scale_continuous.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    Uniform_isConvexTvs
    Source code
    .Build R E locally_convex.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    end
    Source code
    .

    Section ConvexTvs_numDomain.
    Context (
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType) (
    E
    Source code
     : convexTvsType R) (
    U
    Source code
     : set E).

    Lemma
    nbhs0N
    Source code
     : nbhs 0 U -> nbhs 0 (-%R @` U).
    Proof.
    exact/nbhs0N_subproof/scale_continuous. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhsT
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     :E) : nbhs 0 U -> nbhs x (+%R x @` U).
    Proof.
    exact/nbhsT_subproof/add_continuous. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhsB
    Source code
     (
    z
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : E) : nbhs z U -> nbhs (x + z) (+%R x @` U).
    Proof.
    exact/nbhsB_subproof/add_continuous. Qed.

    End ConvexTvs_numDomain.

    Section ConvexTvs_numField.

    Lemma
    nbhs0Z
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    E
    Source code
     : convexTvsType R) (
    U
    Source code
     : set E) (
    r
    Source code
     : R) :
      r != 0 -> nbhs 0 U -> nbhs 0 ( *:%R r @` U ).
    Proof.
    move=> r0 U0; have /= := scale_continuous (r^-1, 0) U.
    rewrite scaler0 => /(_ U0)[]/= B [B1 B2] BU.
    near=> x => //=; exists (r^-1 *: x); last by rewrite scalerA divff// scale1r.
    by apply: (BU (r^-1, x)); split => //=;[exact: nbhs_singleton|near: x].
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhsZ
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    E
    Source code
     : convexTvsType R) (
    U
    Source code
     : set E) (
    r
    Source code
     : R) (
    x
    Source code
     :E) :
      r != 0 -> nbhs x U -> nbhs (r *:x) ( *:%R r @` U ).
    Proof.
    move=> r0 U0; have /= := scale_continuous ((r^-1, r *: x)) U.
    rewrite scalerA mulVf// scale1r =>/(_ U0)[] /= B [B1 B2] BU.
    near=> z; exists (r^-1 *: z); last by rewrite scalerA divff// scale1r.
    by apply: (BU (r^-1,z)); split; [exact: nbhs_singleton|near: z].
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    End ConvexTvs_numField.

    Section standard_topology.
    Variable
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType.

    NB: we have almost the same proof in `pseudometric_normed_Zmodule.v`
    Let
    standard_add_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : R^o * R^o => x.1 + x.2).
    Proof.
    move=> [/= x y]; apply/cvgrPdist_lt=> _/posnumP[e]; near=> a b => /=.
    by rewrite opprD addrACA normm_lt_split.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Let
    standard_scale_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : R^o * R^o => z.1 *: z.2).
    Proof.
    move=> [/= k x]; apply/cvgrPdist_lt => _/posnumP[e]; near +oo_R => M.
    near=> l z => /=; have M0 : 0 < M by [].
    rewrite (@distm_lt_split _ _ (k *: z)) // -?(scalerBr, scalerBl) normrM.
      rewrite (@le_lt_trans _ _ (M * `|x - z|)) ?ler_wpM2r -?ltr_pdivlMl//.
      by near: z; apply: cvgr_dist_lt; rewrite // mulr_gt0 ?invr_gt0.
    rewrite (@le_lt_trans _ _ (`|k - l| * M)) ?ler_wpM2l -?ltr_pdivlMr//.
      by near: z; near: M; exact: (@cvg_bounded _ R^o _ _ _ _ _ (@cvg_refl _ _)).
    by near: l; apply: cvgr_dist_lt; rewrite // divr_gt0.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Local Open Scope convex_scope.

    Let
    standard_ball_convex_set
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R^o) (
    r
    Source code
     : R) : convex_set (ball x r).
    Proof.
    apply/convex_setW => z y; rewrite !inE -!ball_normE /= => zx yx l l0 l1.
    rewrite inE/=.
    rewrite [X in `|X|](_ : _ = (x - z : convex_lmodType _) <| l |>
                                (x - y : convex_lmodType _)).
      by rewrite opprD -[in LHS](convmm l x) addrACA -scalerBr -scalerBr.
    rewrite (le_lt_trans (ler_normD _ _))// !normrM.
    rewrite (@ger0_norm _ l%:num)// (@ger0_norm _ l%:num.~) ?onem_ge0//.
    rewrite -[ltRHS]mul1r -(add_onemK l%:num) [ltRHS]mulrDl.
    by rewrite ltrD// ltr_pM2l// onem_gt0.
    Qed.

    Let
    standard_locally_convex_set
    Source code
     :
      exists2
    B
    Source code
     : set_system R^o, (forall
    b
    Source code
    , b \in B -> convex_set b) & basis B.
    Proof.
    exists [set
    B
    Source code
     | exists
    x
    Source code
    r
    Source code
    , B = ball x r].
      by move=> B/= /[!inE]/= [[x]] [r] ->; exact: standard_ball_convex_set.
    split; first by move=> B [x] [r] ->; exact: ball_open.
    move=> x B; rewrite -nbhs_ballE/= => -[r] r0 Bxr /=.
    by exists (ball x r) => //=; split; [exists x, r|exact: ballxx].
    Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      PreTopologicalNmodule_isTopologicalNmodule.Build R^o standard_add_continuous.
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      TopologicalNmodule_isTopologicalLmodule.Build R R^o standard_scale_continuous.
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      Uniform_isConvexTvs.Build R R^o standard_locally_convex_set.

    End standard_topology.

    Section prod_ConvexTvs.
    Context (
    K
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    E
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : convexTvsType K).

    Local Lemma
    prod_add_continuous
    Source code
     :
      continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : (E * F) * (E * F) => x.1 + x.2).
    Proof.
    move => [/= xy1 xy2] /= U /= [] [A B] /= [nA nB] nU.
    have [/= A0 [A01 A02] nA1] := @add_continuous E (xy1.1, xy2.1) _ nA.
    have [/= B0 [B01 B02] nB1] := @add_continuous F (xy1.2, xy2.2) _ nB.
    exists ([set
    xy
    Source code
     | A0.1 xy.1 /\ B0.1 xy.2], [set
    xy
    Source code
     | A0.2 xy.1 /\ B0.2 xy.2]).
      by split; [exists (A0.1, B0.1)|exists (A0.2, B0.2)].
    move => [[x1 y1][x2 y2]] /= [] [] a1 b1 [] a2 b2.
    by apply: nU; split; [exact: (nA1 (x1, x2))|exact: (nB1 (y1, y2))].
    Qed.

    Local Lemma
    prod_scale_continuous
    Source code
     :
      continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : K^o * (E * F) => z.1 *: z.2).
    Proof.
    move => [/= r [x y]] /= U /= []/= [A B] /= [nA nB] nU.
    have [/= A0 [A01 A02] nA1] := @scale_continuous K E (r, x) _ nA.
    have [/= B0 [B01 B02] nB1] := @scale_continuous K F (r, y) _ nB .
    exists (A0.1 `&` B0.1, A0.2 `*` B0.2).
      by split; [exact: filterI|exists (A0.2,B0.2)].
    by move=> [l [e f]] /= [] [Al Bl] [] Ae Be; apply: nU; split;
      [exact: (nA1 (l, e))|exact: (nB1 (l, f))].
    Qed.

    Local Lemma
    prod_locally_convex
    Source code
     :
      exists2
    B
    Source code
     : set_system (E * F), (forall
    b
    Source code
    , b \in B -> convex_set b) & basis B.
    Proof.
    have [Be Bcb Beb] := @locally_convex K E.
    have [Bf Bcf Bfb] := @locally_convex K F.
    pose B := [set
    ef
    Source code
     : set (E * F) | open ef /\
      exists
    be
    Source code
    , exists2
    bf
    Source code
    , Be be & Bf bf /\ be `*` bf = ef].
    have : basis B.
      rewrite /basis/=; split; first by move=> b => [] [].
      move=> /= [x y] ef [[ne nf]] /= [Ne Nf] Nef.
      case: Beb => Beo /(_ x ne Ne) /= -[a] [] Bea ax ea.
      case: Bfb => Bfo /(_ y nf Nf) /= -[b] [] Beb yb fb.
      exists [set
    z
    Source code
     | a z.1 /\ b z.2]; last first.
        by apply: subset_trans Nef => -[zx zy] /= [] /ea + /fb.
      split=> //=; split; last by exists a, b.
      rewrite openE => [[z z'] /= [az bz]]; exists (a, b) => /=; last by [].
      rewrite !nbhsE /=; split; first by exists a => //; split => //; exact: Beo.
      by exists b => //; split => // []; exact: Bfo.
    exists B => // => b; rewrite inE /= => [[]] bo [] be [] bf Bee [] Bff <-.
    move => [x1 y1] [x2 y2] l /[!inE] /= -[xe1 yf1] [xe2 yf2].
    split.
      by apply/set_mem/Bcb; [exact/mem_set|exact/mem_set|exact/mem_set].
    by apply/set_mem/Bcf; [exact/mem_set|exact/mem_set|exact/mem_set].
    Qed.

    Source code

    .Build
      (E * F)%type prod_add_continuous.

    TopologicalNmodule_isTopologicalLmodule

    .Build
      K (E * F)%type prod_scale_continuous.
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance

      Uniform_isConvexTvs.Build K (E * F)%type prod_locally_convex.

    End prod_ConvexTvs.

      (F : NbhsZmodule.type) (s : K -> F -> F) :=

    f

     of @GRing.Linear K E F s f & @Continuous E F f }.

    HB
    Source code

     (

        linearP : linear_for s f ;

      }.

    Section lcfun_pred.
    Context {
    K
    Source code
     : numDomainType} {
    E
    Source code
     : NbhsLmodule.type K} {
    F
    Source code
     : NbhsZmodule.type}
      {
    s
    Source code
     : K -> F -> F}.

    Definition
    lcfun
    Source code
     : {pred E -> F} :=
      mem [set
    f
    Source code
     | linear_for s f /\ continuous f ].

    Definition
    lcfun_key
    Source code
     : pred_key lcfun
    Proof.
    exact. Qed.

    Canonical
    lcfun_keyed
    Source code
     := KeyedPred lcfun_key.

    End lcfun_pred.

    Notation
    "{ 'linear_continuous' U -> V | s }"
    Source code
     :=
      (@LinearContinuous.type _ U%type V%type s) : type_scope.
    Notation
    "{ 'linear_continuous' U -> V }"
    Source code
     :=
      {linear_continuous U%type -> V%type | *:%R} : type_scope.

    Section lcfun.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType} {
    E
    Source code
     : NbhsLmodule.type R}
      {
    F
    Source code
     : NbhsZmodule.type} {
    s
    Source code
     : GRing.Scale.law R F}.

    Notation
    T
    Source code
     := {linear_continuous E -> F | s}.

    Notation
    lcfun
    Source code
     := (@lcfun _ E F s).

    Section Sub.
    Context (
    f
    Source code
     : E -> F) (
    fP
    Source code
     : f \in lcfun).

    #[local] Definition
    lcfun_Sub_subproof
    Source code
     :=
      @isLinearContinuous.Build _ E F s f (proj1 (set_mem fP)) (proj2 (set_mem fP)).

    #[local]
    Source code
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    lcfun_Sub_subproof
    Source code
    .

    Definition
    lcfun_Sub
    Source code
     : {linear_continuous _ -> _ | _ } := f.

    End Sub.

    Let
    lcfun_rect
    Source code
     (
    K
    Source code
     : T -> Type) :
      (forall
    f
    Source code
     (
    Pf
    Source code
     : f \in lcfun), K (lcfun_Sub Pf)) -> forall
    u
    Source code
     : T, K u.
    Proof.
    move=> Ksub [f [[Pf1] [Pf2] [Pf3]]].
    set G := (G in K G).
    have Pf : f \in lcfun.
      by rewrite inE /=; split => // x u v; rewrite Pf1 Pf2.
    suff -> : G = lcfun_Sub Pf by apply: Ksub.
    rewrite {}/G.
    congr (LinearContinuous.Pack (LinearContinuous.Class _ _ _)).
    - by congr GRing.isNmodMorphism.Axioms_; exact: Prop_irrelevance.
    - by congr GRing.isScalable.Axioms_; exact: Prop_irrelevance.
    - by congr isContinuous.Axioms_; exact: Prop_irrelevance.
    Qed.

    Let
    lcfun_valP
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    Pf
    Source code
     : f \in lcfun) : lcfun_Sub Pf = f :> (_ -> _).
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    isSub
    Source code
    .Build _ _ T lcfun_rect lcfun_valP.

    Lemma
    lcfun_eqP
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : {linear_continuous E -> F | s}) : f = g <-> f =1 g.
    Proof.
    by split=> [->//|fg]; exact/val_inj/funext. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    [Choice
    Source code
     of {linear_continuous E -> F | s} by <:].

    Variant
    lcfun_spec
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : E -> F) : (E -> F) -> bool -> Type :=
    |
    Islcfun
    Source code
     (
    l
    Source code
     : {linear_continuous E -> F | s}) : lcfun_spec f l true.

    Lemma
    lcfunP
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : E -> F) : f \in lcfun -> lcfun_spec f f (f \in lcfun).
    Proof.
    move=> /[dup] f_lc ->.
    have {2}-> : f = lcfun_Sub f_lc by rewrite lcfun_valP.
    by constructor.
    Qed.

    End lcfun.

    Section lcfun_comp.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType} {
    E
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : NbhsLmodule.type R}
      {
    S
    Source code
     : NbhsZmodule.type} {
    s
    Source code
     : GRing.Scale.law R S}
      (
    f
    Source code
     : {linear_continuous E -> F}) (
    g
    Source code
     : {linear_continuous F -> S | s}).

    #[local] Lemma
    lcfun_comp_subproof1
    Source code
     : linear_for s (g \o f).
    Proof.
    by move=> *; move=> *; rewrite !linearP. Qed.

    #[local] Lemma
    lcfun_comp_subproof2
    Source code
     : continuous (g \o f).
    Proof.
    by move=> x; apply: continuous_comp; exact/continuous_fun. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    @isLinearContinuous
    Source code
    .Build R E S s (g \o f)
      lcfun_comp_subproof1 lcfun_comp_subproof2.

    End lcfun_comp.

    Section lcfun_lmodtype.
    Import GRing.Theory.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType} {
    E
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : convexTvsType R}.
    Implicit Types (r : R) (f g : {linear_continuous E -> F}).

    Lemma
    null_fun_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (\0 : E -> F).
    Proof.
    by apply: cst_continuous. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    isContinuous
    Source code
    .Build E F \0 null_fun_continuous.

    #[local] Lemma
    lcfun_continuousD
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : continuous (f \+ g).
    Proof.
    by move=> /= x; apply: fun_cvgD; exact: continuous_fun. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      isContinuous.Build E F (f \+ g) (@lcfun_continuousD f g).

    #[local] Lemma
    lcfun_continuousN
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : continuous (\- f).
    Proof.
    by move=> /= x; apply: fun_cvgN; exact: continuous_fun. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code

    Source code
    _

    f

      isContinuous.Build E F (\- f) (@lcfun_continuousN f).

    #[local] Lemma
    lcfun_continuousM
    Source code
    r
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : continuous (r \*: g).

    by move=> /= x; apply: fun_cvgZr; exact: continuous_fun. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    r
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      isContinuous.Build E F (r \*: g) (@lcfun_continuousM r g).

    #[local] Lemma
    lcfun_submod_closed
    Source code
     : submod_closed (@lcfun R E F *:%R).
    Proof.
    split; first by rewrite inE; split; first apply/linearP; exact: cst_continuous.
    move=> r /= _ _ /lcfunP[f] /lcfunP[g].
    by rewrite inE /=; split; [exact: linearP | exact: lcfun_continuousD].
    Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code

      
    @GRing
    Source code
    .isSubmodClosed.Build _ _ lcfun lcfun_submod_closed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code

    Source code
    _
    Source code

    Source code

      [SubChoice_isSubLmodule of {linear_continuous E -> F } by <:].

    End lcfun_lmodtype.

    Section lcfunproperties.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType} {
    E
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : NbhsLmodule.type R}
      (
    f
    Source code
     : {linear_continuous E -> F}).

    #[warn(note="Consider using `continuous_fun` instead.",cats="discoverability")]
    Lemma
    lcfun_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous f.
    Proof.
    exact: continuous_fun. Qed.

    #[warn(note="Consider using `linearP` instead.",cats="discoverability")]
    Lemma
    lcfun_linear
    Source code
     : linear f.
    Proof.
    move => *; exact: linearP. Qed.

    End lcfunproperties.
    Generated by rocqnavi
